<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::vector<uint8_t> read_buffer_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& source_buffer, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    // Create a buffer_adaptor object from the source_buffer
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<const std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(source_buffer);
    
    // Check if the requested bytes_to_read is available using the size() method
    if (adaptor.size() < bytes_to_read) {
        throw hexi::buffer_underrun(bytes_to_read, adaptor.size(), adaptor.total_read());
    }
    
    // Create a destination vector and use the read() method to read the data
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_read);
    adaptor.read(destination.data(), bytes_to_read);
    
    return destination;
}

void write_buffer_data(std::vector<uint8_t>& dest_buffer, const std::vector<uint8_t>& source_data) {
    // Create a buffer_adaptor object from the dest_buffer
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(dest_buffer);
    
    // Seek to the beginning of the buffer for writing
    adaptor.write_seek(hexi::buffer_seek::sk_absolute, 0);
    
    // Check if there is enough space using the free() method
    if (adaptor.free() < source_data.size()) {
        throw hexi::buffer_overflow(source_data.size(), adaptor.free(), adaptor.total_write());
    }
    
    // Use the write() method to write the source_data into the dest_buffer
    adaptor.write(source_data.data(), source_data.size());
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct DataResult {
    uint8_t data_type;
    std::vector<uint32_t> int_items;
    std::vector<float> float_items;
};

DataResult preview_and_read_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Create a buffer_adaptor from the input buffer
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    
    // Use the adaptor's preview function to get the data_type without advancing the read pointer
    uint8_t data_type = adaptor.preview();
    
    // Check the available data size using the adaptor's size function
    if (adaptor.size() < 4) {
        // Not enough data for item_count
        return {data_type, {}, {}};
    }
    
    // Create a binary_stream from the buffer_adaptor
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    // Read the item_count (uint32_t) from the buffer
    uint32_t item_count;
    stream.get(&item_count, 1);
    
    // Check available data size for the items based on data_type
    if (adaptor.size() < (data_type == 0 ? item_count * sizeof(uint32_t) : item_count * sizeof(float))) {
        return {data_type, {}, {}};
    }
    
    DataResult result;
    result.data_type = data_type;
    
    // Read the items based on the data_type
    if (data_type == 0) {
        result.int_items.resize(item_count);
        stream.get(result.int_items);
    } else {
        result.float_items.resize(item_count);
        stream.get(result.float_items);
    }
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_data_without_consuming(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(bytes_to_preview);
    storage.copy(result.data(), bytes_to_preview);
    return result;
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferStatus {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferStatus<> check_buffer_status(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<1024>& storage) {
    BufferStatus<> status;
    status.readable_size = storage.size();
    status.free_space = storage.free();
    return status;
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void reset_buffer(hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    storage.clear();
}
```</answer>

        using namespace hexi::detail;

        template<typename T>
        std::size_t encode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, T value) {
            using unsigned_T = std::make_unsigned_t<T>;
            unsigned_T uvalue = static_cast<unsigned_T>(value);
            std::size_t written = 0;
            while (uvalue > 0x7f) {
                const std::uint8_t byte = (uvalue & 0x7f) | 0x80;
                writer.put(byte);
                uvalue >>= 7;
                ++written;
            }
            const std::uint8_t byte = uvalue & 0x7f;
            writer.put(byte);
            return ++written;
        }

        template<typename T>
        T decode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
            int shift { 0 };
            T value { 0 };
            std::uint8_t byte = 0;

            do {
                byte = 0; // clear in case an error occurs
                reader.get(&byte, 1);
                value |= (static_cast<T>(byte & 0x7f) << shift);
                shift += 7;
            } while(byte & 0x80);

            return value;
        }

        template<typename T>
        bool encode_decode_roundtrip(T original_value) {

            hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader reader2(read_adaptor);

            T decoded_value = decode_varint(reader2);

            return original_value == decoded_value;
        }
